text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet is exhausted, so I decide to bring
her to the infirmary to rest.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Good grief. It's really not a big deal... but if it'll
make you happy, then whatever.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Where the heck am I?! Trainer? Are you there?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Eek! No way... Is that a zombie?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Aaah! I hate horror films! Stay away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet lashes out blindly and lands a clean
roundhouse kick on the zombie!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At that moment, a bright light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that... just a dream?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
That zombie did seem pretty weak. I mean, I am
number one, after all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Revitalized, Daiwa Scarlet leaves the infirmary
with a spring in her step.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Daiwa Scarlet scream, the zombie
shambles forward and attacks!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At that moment, a bright light floods the room.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
W-was that...just a d-dream?! More like a
nightmare... I'm never going to be able to sleep
tonight.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unable to forget the dream she had, Daiwa
Scarlet fails to get a proper rest.
